scenes.title: Button Idle
scenes.description: The opening idle scene. This remains DOM-first and owns the button economy.

scenes.title: Marble
scenes.description: The first real-time scene. This begins as a custom canvas runtime.

scenes.title: Phaser Test
scenes.description: A sandbox scene used to validate the Phaser scene adapter before larger genre scenes are added.

scenes.title: MUD
scenes.description: Text-command scene scaffold for future MUD systems.

scenes.title: Retro RPG
scenes.description: Retro RPG scaffold for Phaser-based world traversal.

scenes.title: Platformer
scenes.description: Platformer scaffold for physics-heavy action gameplay.

scenes.title: Racing
scenes.description: Racing scene scaffold for future track systems.

scenes.title: Go
scenes.description: Board-game canvas scaffold for Go rules and board state.

scenes.title: Number Munchers
scenes.description: Canvas scaffold for Number Munchers gameplay loops.

scenes.title: Pokémon-like RPG
scenes.description: Phaser scaffold for Pokémon-like capture/battle systems.

scenes.title: Point & Click
scenes.description: DOM scaffold for point-and-click narrative interactions.

scenes.title: Tower Defense
scenes.description: Phaser scaffold for lane and tower systems.

scenes.title: JRPG
scenes.description: Phaser scaffold for party and turn-based systems.
